docs.title: Documentation-ka Tusmo
docs.text: Ku soo dhowow Tusmo, luqad barnaamijka Soomaaliga ah!

docs.title: Bilow Degdeg ah
docs.text:
# Install
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TusmoLang-org/Tusmo/main/install.sh | bash

# Run
tusmo hello.tus

docs.title: Documentation
docs.text:
• Bilaabista
  • Sida ay u shaqeyso
  • Doorsoomayaasha
  • Erayada (Strings)
  • Tixyada (Arrays)
  • Qaamuusyada (Dictionaries)
  • Xaaladaha (Conditions)
  • Wareegyada (Loops)
  • Hawlaha (Functions)
  • Kooxaha (Classes)
  • Hawl-wadeennada (Operators)
  • Maktabadda Caadiga ah (Standard Library)

docs.title: Modules-ka Maktabadda
docs.text:
• Module-ka OS
  • Module-ka Wakhti
  • Module-ka Nasiib
  • Module-ka Xiriiriye
  • Module-ka WebXiriiriye
  • Module-ka HTTP

docs.title: Tixyada
docs.text: Tixyada Tusmo waxay isticmaalaan syntax-ka tix:<nooca>.

docs.title: Sheegista
docs.text:
keyd:tix:tiro tirooyin = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5];
keyd:tix:eray erayo = ["foo", "bar", "baz"];
keyd:tix:jajab jajabyo = [1.1, 2.2, 3.3];
keyd:tix:miyaa calamo = [haa, maya, haa];
keyd:tix:tiro eber = [];

docs.title: Helidda Xubnaha
docs.text:
qor(tirooyin[0]);  // Xubinta koowaad
qor(tirooyin[2]);  // Xubinta saddexaad

docs.title: Beddelidda Xubnaha
docs.text:
keyd:tix:tiro tix_ = [10, 20, 30];
tix_[0] = 100;

docs.title: Dhererka Tixda
docs.text: qor(dherer(tirooyin));

docs.title: Ku Soco (For-Each)
docs.text:
soco xubin kasta laga helo tirooyin {
    qor(xubin);
}

docs.title: Tixyada 2D
docs.text:
keyd:tix:tix:tiro matrix = [[1, 2], [3, 4], [5, 6]];

qor(matrix[0][0]);  // 1
qor(matrix[1][1]);  // 4

keyd:tix:tix:eray stringMatrix = [["a", "b"], ["c", "d"]];
qor(stringMatrix[0][0]);  // "a"

docs.title: Tixyada leh Weedho (Expressions)
docs.text:
keyd:tiro qiimo1 = 1;
keyd:tiro qiimo2 = 2;
keyd:tix:tiro exprArr = [qiimo1 + qiimo2, qiimo1 * qiimo2, qiimo2 - qiimo1];

docs.title: Kooxaha (Classes)
docs.text: Tusmo waxay taageertaa barnaamijka ku salaysan waxa af-ka qalaad lagu yiraahdo oop (object-oriented programming) iyadoo la isticmaalayo keyword-ka koox.

docs.title: Qeexidda Kooxda (Class Definition)
docs.text:
koox Qof {
    keyd:eray magac;
    keyd:tiro da'da;

    dhis(n: eray) : waxbo {
        kan.magac = n;
        kan.da'da = 0;
    }

    hawl soo_dhah() : waxbo {
        qor("Magaca: " + kan.magac);
    }

    hawl setAge(a: tiro) : waxbo {
        kan.da'da = a;
    }

    hawl getAge() : tiro {
        soo_celi kan.da'da;
    }
}

docs.title: Sameynta Instance
docs.text:
U isticmaal keyword-ka cusub si aad u sameyso instance cusub:

keyd:Qof p1 = Qof("Ali") cusub;
p1.setAge(25);
p1.soo_dhah();
qor(p1.getAge());

docs.title: Constructor
docs.text:
Habka dhis wuxuu u shaqeeyaa sidii constructor:

dhis(n: eray) : waxbo {
    kan.magac = n;
    kan.da'da = 0;
}

docs.title: Tixraaca Nafsiyi (Self Reference)
docs.text:
U isticmaal kan si aad u tixraacdo instance-ka hadda jooga:

kan.magac = n;
kan.da'da = a;
soo_celi kan.da'da;

docs.title: Dhaxalka (Inheritance)
docs.text:
U isticmaal keyword-ka dhaxlaya si aad u dhaxasho koox kale:

koox Baabuur {
    keyd:tiro taayiro;
    keyd:eray nooca;

    dhis(t: tiro) : waxbo {
        kan.taayiro = t;
        kan.nooca = "Baabuur";
    }

    hawl socoshada() : waxbo {
        qor("Baabuur wuu socdaa");
    }
}

koox Toyota dhaxlaya Baabuur {
    keyd:eray model;

    dhis(m: eray) : waxbo {
        waalid.dhis(4);
        kan.model = m;
    }

    hawl socoshada() : waxbo {
        waalid.socoshada();
        qor("Toyota " + kan.model);
    }
}

U isticmaal waalid si aad u tixraacdo kooxda waalidka ah (parent class):

waalid.socoshada();  // Wac habka waalidka

docs.title: Tusaale Dhammaystiran
docs.text:
koox Ciyaaryahan {
    keyd:eray magac;
    keyd:miyaa nolol;
    keyd:tiro dhibco;

    dhis(n: eray) : waxbo {
        kan.magac = n;
        kan.nolol = haa;
        kan.dhibco = 0;
    }

    hawl ku_dhac() : waxbo {
        kan.nolol = maya;
    }

    hawl ku_dar_dhibco(dhibco: tiro) : waxbo {
        kan.dhibco = kan.dhibco + dhibco;
    }

    hawl ma_nool_yahay() : miyaa {
        soo_celi kan.nolol;
    }

    hawl hel_dhibco() : tiro {
        soo_celi kan.dhibco;
    }
}

keyd:Ciyaaryahan ciyaaryahan = Ciyaaryahan("Halyeey") cusub;
qor(ciyaaryahan.magac);
qor(" ma nool yahay: ");
qor(ciyaaryahan.ma_nool_yahay());
ciyaaryahan.ku_dhac();
ciyaaryahan.ku_dar_dhibco(100);
qor("Dhibcaha: ");
qor(ciyaaryahan.hel_dhibco());

docs.title: Keyword-yada Kooxda
docs.text: Keyword Sharaxaad koox Sheegista kooxda dhaxlaya Keyword-ka dhaxalka waalid Tixraaca kooxda waalidka cusub Sameynta instance cusub kan Tixraaca naftiisa dhis Constructor ama dhise hawl / shaqo Sheegista habka (method)

docs.title: Xaaladaha (Conditions)
docs.text: Tusmo waxay u isticmaashaa keyword-yo Soomaali ah weedhaha shuruudda leh.

docs.title: Weedha Haddii (If Statement)
docs.text:
haddii (x > 5) {
    qor("x wuxuu ka weyn yahay 5");
}

docs.title: Haddii-Haddii_kale (If-Else)
docs.text:
haddii (x < 5) {
    qor("x wuxuu ka yar yahay 5");
} haddii_kale {
    qor("x kama yara 5");
}

docs.title: Haddii - Ama_haddii - Haddii_kale (If-Elif-Else)
docs.text:
haddii (x == 5) {
    qor("x wuxuu la mid yahay 5");
} ama_haddii (x == 10) {
    qor("x wuxuu la mid yahay 10");
} ama_haddii (x == 15) {
    qor("x wuxuu la mid yahay 15");
} haddii_kale {
    qor("x waa wax kale");
}

docs.title: Xaaladaha Isku-dhex-jirta
docs.text:
haddii (x > 5) {
    qor("x > 5");
    haddii (y > 15) {
        qor("y isna wuxuu ka weyn yahay 15");
    }
}

docs.title: Hawl-wadeennada Isbarbardhigga (Comparison Operators)
docs.text: Hawl-wadeen Sharaxaad == La mid ah != Aan la mid ahayn < Ka yar > Ka weyn <= Ka yar ama la mid ah >= Ka weyn ama la mid ah

docs.title: Hawl-wadeennada Boolean (Boolean Operators)
Ternary Operator
docs.text: keyd:miyaa weyn = x > y ? haa : maya;

docs.title: Qaamuusyada (Dictionaries)
docs.text: Qaamuusyada Tusmo waxay u isticmaalaan nooca qaamuus lammaanaha fure-iyo-qiimo (key-value pairs).

docs.title: Sheegista
docs.text:
keyd:qaamuus qaamuusEber;
keyd:qaamuus qof = {"magac": "Ali", "da": 25};

docs.title: Helidda Qiimayaasha
docs.text:
qor(qof["magac"]);  // "Ali"
qor(qof["da"]);     // 25

docs.title: Beddelidda Qiimayaasha
docs.text: qof["da"] = 26;

docs.title: Ku-daridda Furayaal Cusub
docs.text: qof["telefoon"] = "612345678";

docs.title: Qaamuusyada Is-dhex-jira
docs.text:
keyd:qaamuus is_dhex_jira = {
    "isticmaale": {
        "magac": "admin",
        "email": "admin@test.com"
    }
};

qor(is_dhex_jira["isticmaale"]["magac"]);

docs.title: Noocyo Qiimo oo Kala Duwan
docs.text:
keyd:qaamuus isku_dhaf = {
    "magac": "Tijaabo",
    "da": 20,
    "dhibco": 95.5,
    "shaqaynaya": haa
};

docs.title: Hawlaha (Functions)
docs.text: Tusmo waxay taageertaa hawlaha leh laba qaab oo syntax ah.

docs.title: Syntax-ka Hawsha
docs.text: Tusmo waxay taageertaa laba qaab oo syntax-ka hawsha ah:

docs.title: Qaabka semi colon-ka (:) (soo-celin waxbo ah)
docs.text:
hawl salaam(magac: eray) : waxbo {
    qor("Hello " + magac);
}

docs.title: Qaabka semi colon-ka (:) (leh soo-celin)
docs.text:
shaqo isku_dar(a: tiro, b: tiro) : tiro {
    soo_celi a + b;
}

docs.title: Qaabka Arrow-ga (=>) (soo-celin waxbo ah)
docs.text:
hawl salaam(magac: eray) => waxbo {
    qor("Hello " + magac);
}

docs.title: Qaabka Arrow-ga (=>) (leh soo-celin)
docs.text:
shaqo isku_dar(a: tiro, b: tiro) => tiro {
    soo_celi a + b;
}

docs.title: FG: Tusmo waxay taggeertaa sidoo kale labo keyword ku waas oo lagu declare-gareeyo functions-ka kuwaa oo kala ah hawl ama shaqo
Qiimayaasha la soo celiyo
docs.text:
U isticmaal soo_celi si aad u soo celiso qiimo:

hawl qaybi(a: jajab, b: jajab) => jajab {
    soo_celi a / b;
}

hawl helFariin() : eray {
    soo_celi "Tani waa fariin";
}

docs.title: Halbeegyada leh Qiimaha caadiga ah (Default Values)
docs.text:
hawl salaamCaadi ah(magac: eray, horgale: eray = "Mr.") : waxbo {
    qor("Hello " + horgale + " " + magac);
}

docs.title: Aan lahayn Halbeegyo
docs.text:
hawl dhehHello() : waxbo {
    qor("Kaliya waxaan leeyahay Hello!");
}

docs.title: Soo-celinta Boolean
docs.text:
hawl waaDhowr(n: tiro) : miyaa {
    keyd:miyaa natiijo = (n % 2) == 0;
    soo_celi natiijo;
}

docs.title: Halbeegyada Tixda
docs.text:
hawl isku_darTix(arr: tix:tiro) : tiro {
    keyd:tiro wadarta = 0;
    soco xubin kasta laga helo arr {
        wadarta = wadarta + xubin;
    }
    soo_celi wadarta;
}

docs.title: Keyword-yada Hawsha
docs.text: Keyword Sharaxaad hawl ama shaqo Qeexista function soo_celi Soo-celinta qiimaha : waxbo ama => waxbo Nooca soo-celinta waxbo (void) => <nooca> ama : <nooca> Nooca soo-celinta (qaabka falaarta)

docs.title: Wacidda Hawlaha
docs.text:
salaam("Tusmo");
keyd:tiro natiijo = isku_dar(5, 3);
qor(qaybi(10.0, 4.0));

docs.title: Linux/macOS
docs.text: curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TusmoLang-org/Tusmo/main/install.sh | bash

docs.title: Windows
docs.text: irm https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TusmoLang-org/Tusmo/main/install.ps1 | iex

docs.title: Talo Muhiim ah
docs.text: Markaad la soo dagto tusmo waa inaad isticmaasho VScode si aad u hesho syntax highlighter iyo hover documentation kuwaaso si automatic ah kugu soo dagi doono xiliga installation-ka haddii vscode uu kugu jiray horey.

docs.title: Barnaamijkaagii ugu Horreeyay
docs.text:
Sameey hello.tus:

qor("Hello, Soomali Developers!");

docs.title: Sida loo run loo dhaho Tusmo
docs.text:
Kaliya u gudbi faylka .tus amarka tusmo:

tusmo hello.tus

docs.title: Isticmaalka (Usage)
docs.text:
tusmo <fayl.tus> [doorashooyin]

Doorashooyinka (Options):
  --c           Hayso faylka code-ka C ee la sameeyay
  -h, --help    Kutusinaysa cawimaad (help)
  -v, --version Kutusinaysa version-ka aad haysato iyo in uu jiro version cusub
  -l, --libraries Liiska maktabadaha (libraries) ee la taageero
  update        Cusboonaysiinta Tusmo oo soo dajinaysa version-kii ugu dambeeyay
  install <lib> soo dajinta (install) maktabadaha (library)

docs.title: Sida ay u Shaqeyso
docs.text:
hello.tus  →  tusmo (parser)  →  hello.c  →  zig cc  →  hello (binary)  →  ./hello
                       ↓  
              ↓      iyadoo la isticmaalayo python
         AST → semantic analysis → C code generation
              ↓
         runtime/*.c + stdlib/*.tus → la xiriiriyay (linked)

docs.title: Pipeline-ka Turjumidda (Compilation Pipeline)
docs.text:
1. Lexing - Token-ka laga soosaraya code-ka Tusmo
  2. Parsing - Dhis AST (Abstract Syntax Tree)
  3. Semantic Analysis - Hubinta nooca (type checking), xallinta astaanta (symbol resolution)
  4. Code Generation - Samee code-ka C iyadoo la isticmaalayo AST
  5. Compilation - Zig wuxuu u beddelaa C-code-ka binary la fulin karo
  6. Execution - Run-kareynta binary-ga

Siidaynta (release) la socota waxaa ku jira: - Zig compiler - Wuxuu C u beddelaa binary - Boehm GC - Qashin-ururiye (Garbage collector) (horay loo dhisay) - Runtime library - Taageerada erayga (string), tixda (array), qaamuuska (dictionary) - Standard library - OS, HTTP, sockets, iwm.

Uma baahnid inaad soo dagsato GCC ama libgc gacantaada.

docs.title: Hayso Code-ka C (Keep C Code)
docs.text:
U isticmaal calanka (flag) --c si aad u haysato faylka C ee la sameeyay:

tusmo hello.tus --c

Tani waxay soo saaraysaa hello.c isla directory-ga dhexdiisa.

docs.title: Tusaale Code
docs.text:
// Barnaamijkaygii ugu horreeyay ee Tusmo
keyd:eray magac = "Tusmo";
keyd:tiro da'da = 5;

qor($"Hello, {magac}!");
qor($"Da'da: {da'da}");

Natiijada (Output):

Hello, Tusmo!
Da'da: 5

docs.title: Shuruudaha (Requirements)
docs.text:
Haddii aad ula soo dageyso luqadan adigoo umaraayo install.sh ama install.ps1 uma baahnid: - Zig compiler - Boehm GC - Maktabadaha Runtime (Runtime libraries)

Kaliya soo dagso luuqada adigoo u maraayo

docs.title: Windows / MacOs
docs.text: curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TusmoLang-org/Tusmo/main/install.sh | bash

docs.title: Windows
docs.text:
irm https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TusmoLang-org/Tusmo/main/install.ps1 | iex

kadib horey ugal qorista code-ka tusmo

docs.title: Sida Tusmo u Shaqeyso
docs.text: Dukumiintigan wuxuu sharaxayaa shaqada gudaha ee compiler-ka Tusmo.

docs.title: Dulmarka Qaab-dhismeedka (Architecture Overview)
docs.text:
source.tus  →  Lexer  →  Parser  →  AST  →  Semantic  →  Transpiler  →  Code-ka C
                                     ↓                                         ↓
                               Symbol Table                              zig cc
                                                                              ↓
                                                                        binary-ga

docs.title: 1. Lexing (Tokenization)
docs.text:
Lexer-ku wuxuu u beddelaa code-ka Tusmo tokens:

# compiler/frontend/lexer/lexer.py
keywords = {
    'haddii': 'HADDII',
    'keen': 'KEEN',
    'tiro': 'TIRO',
    'eray': 'ERAY',
    '___c__call_': 'C_CALL',
    # ... keyword-yo badan
}

docs.title: 2. Parsing (AST Generation)
docs.text:
Parser-ku wuxuu ka dhisaa Abstract Syntax Tree (AST) tokens-ka:

Program
  └── VariableDeclaration (keyd:tiro x = 5)
        ├── magac: "x"
        ├── nooca: "tiro"
        └── qiimaha: 5 (IntegerLiteral)

docs.title: 3. Semantic Analysis
docs.text:
• Diiwaangelinta: Magacyada variable-da waxaa lagu keydiyaa Jadwalka Astaamaha (Symbol Table).

  • Badbaadada Nooca (Type Safety): Waxay hubisaa in hawlgalada (operations) ay is-waafaqsan yihiin. Tusaale: Ma ogolaanayso in tiro lagu daro eray (5 + "Tusmo"), waayo taasi waxay jebinaysaa badbaadada nooca.

  • Ansixinta Hawlaha : Marka function loogu yeero (call), waxay hubisaa: In function-kaas uu jiro. In tirada xogta la siiyay (arguments) ay la mid tahay intii uu u baahnaa (parameters). In noocyada xogta (types) ay sax yihiin.

docs.title: 4. Code Generation (Transpilation)
docs.text:
Transpiler-ku wuxuu u beddelaa AST-ka → C code:

// Code-ka C ee laga sameeyay keyd:tiro x = 5;
int x;
x = 5;

docs.title: Keyword-ka keen (Import)
docs.text:
Keyword-ka keen wuxuu soo import-kareyaa modules-ka. Compiler-ku wuxuu raadiyaa in uu soo helo module-ka la soo import-kareeyay:

keen "os";

Nidaamka sida uu u raadin doono: 1. Directory-ga hadda la joogo 2. Directory-ga .lib/ 3. Directory-ga stdlib/ (ee ku dhex dhisan)

AST-ga module-ka la soo import-kareeyay waxaa lagu darayaa ama lagu biirinayaa main AST-ga.

docs.title: Hawsha ___c__call_
docs.text:
Tani waa mid gaar ah oo ku dhex dhisan oo si toos ah uga wacda hawlaha(Functions-ka) C code-ka Tusmo dhexdeeda:

// Gudaha stdlib/os.tus
hawl halkee() : eray {
    soo_celi ___c__call_("tusmo_os_cwd"); // tusmo_os_cwd waa function laga leeyahay c  waxaana looga dhex wacay tusmo dhexdeeda
}

Sida ay u shaqeyso: 1. Parser-ku wuxuu sameeyaa in function-ka C uu ku daro CCallNode ee ast-ga 2. Transpiler-ku wuxuu soo saaraa: tusmo_os_cwd() 3. Hawsha(function-ka) C waa inay ka jirtaa runtime-ka

Maxaa loo isticmaalaa? - In lagu waco hawlaha(functions-ka) C runtime sida(file I/O, sockets, wakhti) - Helitaanka shaqooyinka ilaa heerka nidaam (system-level) - Hawlgallada muhiimka u ah waxqabadka (performance)

docs.title: Hawsha ___c__code_
docs.text:
Si toos ah u dhex geli code C file tusmo ah:

___c_code_("#include <math.h>"); // kani waa code c ah lkn ku dhex qoran tusmo file

Tani waxay si toos ah ugu koobiyaysaa code-ka C ee la abuuri dooono .

docs.title: Runtime Linking
docs.text:
Tusmo waxay si otomaatig ah u ogaataa features runtime ee loo baahan yahay:

# compiler/backend/transpiler/expression_generator.py

def _generate_ccall(self, node):
    c_function_name = node.c_function_name

    if "tusmo_os" in c_function_name:
        self.main_generator.used_features.add("os")
    elif "tusmo_time" in c_function_name:
        self.main_generator.used_features.add("wakhti")
    elif "tusmo_socket" in c_function_name:
        self.main_generator.used_features.add("socket")

Runtime-ka waxaa ku jira: - runtime/string.c - Hawlgallada erayga (String) - runtime/array.c - Hawlgallada tixda (Array) - runtime/dictionary.c - Hawlgallada qaamuuska (Dictionary) - runtime/os.c - Hawlaha OS - runtime/time.c - Hawlaha wakhtiga - runtime/socket.c - Hawlaha socket - runtime/http.c - Server-ka HTTP

docs.title: Qaab-dhismeedka Code-ka C ee la Sameeyay
docs.text:
#include "tusmo_runtime.h"

int main(void) {
    GC_INIT();

    // Code-kaaga halkan geli

    return 0;
}

Header-ka runtime-ka wuxuu bixiyaa: - GC_INIT() - Bilaabista qashin-ururiyaha (garbage collector) - TusmoString - Nooca erayga - TusmoTixTiro - Nooca tixda integer-ka - TusmoQaamuus - Nooca qaamuuska - Hawlaha caawiyaha ah

docs.title: Hirgelinta Kooxda (Class Implementation)
docs.text:
Kooxaha (classes) waxaa loo hirgeliyaa sidii C structs oo leh function pointers:

// Sidee Loo sameeyay koox Qof { keyd:eray magac; } marka la joogo C
typedef struct Qof {
    char* magac;
    // ... meelo kale
} Qof;

// Habka (Method)
void Qof_setName(Qof* kan, char* magac) {
    kan->magac = magac;
}

docs.title: Maareynta Memory-ga (Memory Management)
docs.text:
Tusmo waxay isticmaashaa Boehm garbage collector:

#include <gc.h>

int main(void) {
    GC_INIT();
    // Dhammaan qoondaynta waa otomaatig
}

Uma baahna malloc/free gacanta ah!

docs.title: Hawlaha C ee Adiga kuu Gaar ah
docs.text:
Waxaad ku dari kartaa hawlahaaga C runtime-ka:

  1. Abuur .c oo ku dar hawlaha (function-ka) kadib file-ka waa in lagaliyaa runtime/
  2. Ku sheeg gudaha file-ka runtime/tusmo_runtime.h oo ku cadeey halkaas hawlaha(functions-ka) uu ka koobanyahay faylka aad abuurtay
  3. Ka wac Tusmo adigoo isticmaalaya ___c__call_("hawshaada")

Tusaale:

// runtime/math.c
int tusmo_my_add(int a, int b) {
    return a + b;
}

// runtime/tusmo_runtime.h
extern int tusmo_my_add(int a, int b);

// Gudaha faylkaaga xisaab.tus
keyd:tiro natiijo = ___c__call_("tusmo_my_add", 3, 4);

docs.title: Nidaamka Dhisidda (Build Process)
docs.text:
Markaad socodsiiso tusmo hello.tus:

  1. Turjum hello.tus + dhammaan module-lada la (import-kareeyay) iyadoo loo turjumaayo C
  2. Dhis AST
  3. Hubi nooca (Type check)
  4. Samee hello.c
  5. U Turjum binary: zig cc hello.c runtime/*.c -lgc -o hello from C to binary
  6. run-garee ./hello

Siidaynta la socota waxaa ku jira wax kasta oo loo baahan yahay - ma jiraan waxyaabo ka baxsan oo loogu baahan yahay.

docs.title: Wareegyada (Loops)
docs.text: Tusmo waxay taageertaa dhowr nooc oo loop (wareegyo) ah.

docs.title: Wareegga Inta ay (While Loop)
docs.text:
keyd:tiro i = 0;
inta ay (i < 5) {
    qor("While: " + i);
    i = i + 1;
}

docs.title: Wareegga Samee-Inta ay (Do-While Loop)
docs.text:
keyd:tiro j = 0;
samay {
    qor("Do-While: " + j);
    j = j + 1;
} inta ay (j < 5);

docs.title: Wareegga Soco ee Range-ka (For Range Loop)
docs.text:
soco k laga bilaabo 0 .. 5 {
    qor("For Range: " + k);
}

docs.title: Wareegga Soco Mid kasta (For-Each Loop)
docs.text:
keyd:tix:eray arr = ["aa", "bb", "cc"];
soco xubin kasta laga helo arr {
    qor("For Each: " + xubin);
}

docs.title: Jooji (Break)
docs.text:
keyd:tiro n = 0;
inta ay (n < 10) {
    n = n + 1;
    haddii (n == 5) {
        joog;
    }
    qor("Tijaabada Break: " + n);
}

docs.title: Kasoco (Continue)
docs.text:
soco m laga bilaabo 0 .. 5 {
    haddii (m == 2) {
        kasoco;
    }
    qor("Tijaabada Continue: " + m);
}

docs.title: Wareegyada Is-dhex-jira
docs.text:
keyd:tiro outer = 0;
inta ay (outer < 3) {
    keyd:tiro inner = 0;
    soco inner_loop laga bilaabo 0 .. 3 {
        haddii (outer == 1 iyo inner == 1) {
            joog;
        }
        qor($"Bannaanka: {outer}, Gudaha: {inner}");
        inner = inner + 1;
    }
    outer = outer + 1;
}

docs.title: Soo-koobidda Keyword-yada Wareegga
docs.text: Keyword Sharaxaad inta ay ... Shuruudda While samay ... Do-while soco ... For/foreach joog Break kasoco Continue laga bilaabo Bilowga range-ka .. Range-ka kasta laga helo Wareeg kasta (iteration)

docs.title: Hawl-wadeennada (Operators)
docs.text: Tusmo waxay taageertaa hawl-wadeenno kala duwan oo loogu talagalay xisaabta, isbarbardhigga, iyo hawlgallada boolean-ka.

docs.title: Hawl-wadeennada Xisaabta (Arithmetic Operators)
docs.text:
keyd:tiro a = 10;
keyd:tiro b = 3;

qor(a + b);   // Isku-dar: 13
qor(a - b);   // Kala-goyn: 7
qor(a * b);   // Isku-dhufasho: 30
qor(a / b);   // Qaybin: 3
qor(a % b);   // Saami (Modulus): 1

docs.title: Kordhinta/Yareynta (Increment/Decrement)
docs.text:
keyd:tiro x = 0;
x = x + 1;    // Kordhin
x = x - 1;    // Yareyn

docs.title: Hawl-wadeennada Meel-dhigga (Assignment Operators)
docs.text:
keyd:tiro y = 0;
y = y + 3;
y = y - 2;
y = y * 2;

docs.title: Hawl-wadeennada Isbarbardhigga (Comparison Operators)
docs.text:
keyd:tiro p = 5;
keyd:tiro q = 10;

qor(p == q);  // La mid ah: maya
qor(p != q);  // Aan la mid ahayn: haa
qor(p < q);   // Ka yar: haa
qor(p > q);   // Ka weyn: maya
qor(p <= q);  // Ka yar ama la mid ah: haa
qor(p >= q);  // Ka weyn ama la mid ah: maya

Isbarbardhigga Float:

keyd:jajab f1 = 3.14;
keyd:jajab f2 = 2.5;
qor(f1 > f2);  // haa

docs.title: Hawl-wadeennada Boolean (Boolean Operators)
Ternary Operator
docs.text:
keyd:tiro num = 5;
keyd:miyaa isBig = num > 10;
keyd:eray result = isBig ? "weyn" : "yar";

docs.title: Kala-horreynta Hawl-wadeennada (Operator Precedence)
docs.text:
keyd:tiro prec = 2 + 3 * 4;    // 14 (isku-dhufashada ayaa horreysa)
prec = (2 + 3) * 4;            // 20 (parentheses ayaa horreeya)

docs.title: Module-ka HTTP
docs.text: Module-ka HTTP wuxuu bixiyaa shaqada server-ka HTTP.

docs.title: Keenista (Import)
docs.text: keen "http";

docs.title: Kooxda Http (Http Class)
docs.text:
Samee server HTTP ah.

keyd:Http server = Http() cusub;

docs.title: dhegeyso(port, handler)
docs.text:
Ku billow server-ka HTTP port cayiman.

hawl maamule(codsi: Codsi) : waxbo {
    qor("Codsiga: " + codsi.waddo());
    codsi.jawaab_caadi("<h1>Hello!</h1>");
}

server.dhegeyso("8080", maamule);

Halbeegyada (Parameters): - port (eray) - Lambarka port-ka (tusaale, "8080") - maamule (hawl) - Hawsha maareynaysa oo qaadanaysa shayga Codsi

docs.title: jooji()
docs.text:
Jooji server-ka.

server.jooji();

docs.title: Kooxda Codsi (Codsi Class)
docs.text: Kooxda Codsi waxay ka dhigan tahay codsi HTTP ah. Waxaa loo gudbiyaa hawshaada maamulaha (handler function).

docs.title: hab()
docs.text:
Hel habka (method) HTTP.

keyd:eray habka = codsi.hab();
// Waxay soo celisaa: "HELID" (GET), "DHIGID" (POST), iwm.

Soo-celinta: eray - Habka HTTP

docs.title: waddo()
docs.text:
Hel wadada/URL-ka codsiga.

keyd:eray wadada = codsi.waddo();
// tusaale, "/api/users"

Soo-celinta: eray - Wadada codsiga

docs.title: xambaare()
docs.text:
Hel nuxurka (body) codsiga.

keyd:eray xambaare = codsi.xambaare();

Soo-celinta: eray - Nuxurka codsiga

docs.title: macmiil()
docs.text:
Hel cinwaanka IP-ga ee macmiilka (client).

keyd:eray macmiil = codsi.macmiil();
// tusaale, "192.168.1.100:12345"

Soo-celinta: eray - Cinwaanka macmiilka

docs.title: hel_madax(magac)
docs.text:
Hel qiimaha header-ka HTTP.

keyd:eray content_type = codsi.hel_madax("Content-Type");
keyd:eray user_agent = codsi.hel_madax("User-Agent");

Halbeegyada: - magac (eray) - Magaca header-ka

Soo-celinta: eray - Qiimaha header-ka

docs.title: jawaab_eray(nuxur, xaalad, nooca_nuxurka)
docs.text:
Dir jawaab qoraal ah.

codsi.jawaab_eray("<h1>Hello</h1>", 200, "text/html; charset=utf-8");

Halbeegyada: - nuxur (eray) - Nuxurka jawaabta - xaalad (tiro) - Code-ka xaaladda HTTP (tusaale, 200, 404) - nooca (eray) - Nooca MIME (tusaale, "text/html")

docs.title: jawaab(data, xaalad, nooca_nuxurka)
docs.text:
Dir jawaab JSON ah.

keyd:qaamuus json_data = {"magac": "Tusmo", "version": "1.0"};
codsi.jawaab(json_data, 200, "application/json");

Halbeegyada: - nuxur (qaamuus) - Xogta loo beddelayo JSON - xaalad (tiro) - Code-ka xaaladda HTTP - nooca (eray) - Nooca MIME

docs.title: jawaab_caadi(nuxur)
docs.text:
Dir jawaab HTML ah.

codsi.jawaab_caadi("<h1>Hello!</h1>");

Halbeegyada: - nuxur (eray) - Nuxurka HTML-ka

docs.title: hel_socket_handle()
docs.text:
Hel socket-ka hoose si loogu dallacsiiyo (upgrade) WebSocket.

keyd:eray socket_handle = codsi.hel_socket_handle();

Soo-celinta: eray - Socket handle-ka WebSocket

docs.title: foom()
docs.text:
Baadh (parse) xogta foomka (application/x-www-form-urlencoded).

keyd:Form foomka = codsi.foom();
keyd:eray magac = foomka.hel("name");
keyd:eray email = foomka.hel("email");

Soo-celinta: Form - Shayga foomka oo leh habka hel(field)

docs.title: Tusaale: Server HTTP Fudud
docs.text:
keen "http";

hawl maaree_codsiga(codsi: Codsi) : waxbo {
    keyd:eray wadada = codsi.waddo();

    haddii (wadada == "/") {
        codsi.jawaab_caadi("<h1>Ku soo dhowow Tusmo!</h1>");
    } ama_haddii (wadada == "/api/hello") {
        keyd:qaamuus data = {"fariin": "Hello API"};
        codsi.jawaab(data, 200, "application/json");
    } haddii_kale {
        codsi.jawaab_eray("Lama Helin", 404, "text/plain");
    }
}

keyd:Http server = Http() cusub;
qor("Server-ku wuxuu ka billowday port 8080");
server.dhegeyso("8080", maaree_codsiga);

docs.title: Tusaale: WebSocket iyada oo loo marayo HTTP
docs.text:
keen "http";
keen "webxiriiriye";

hawl maaree_codsiga(codsi: Codsi) : waxbo {
    keyd:eray dallacsiin = codsi.hel_madax("Upgrade");

    haddii (dallacsiin == "websocket") {
        keyd:eray socket_handle = codsi.hel_socket_handle();
        keyd:eray ws_key = codsi.hel_madax("Sec-WebSocket-Key");

        keyd:WebXiriiriye ws = WebXiriiriye() cusub;
        ws.kor_u_qaad(socket_handle, ws_key);

        qor("WebSocket-ku waa xiriiray!");
        ws.xir(1000, "Waa dhammaaday");
    } haddii_kale {
        codsi.jawaab_caadi("<h1>WebSocket Server</h1>");
    }
}

keyd:Http server = Http() cusub;
server.dhegeyso("8080", maaree_codsiga);

docs.title: Module-ka Nasiib (Random)
docs.text: Module-ka Nasiib wuxuu bixiyaa soo saarista lambarrada nasiibka ah (random).

docs.title: Soo-dejinta (Import)
docs.text:
keen "nasiib";

Bilaabi ka hor isticmaalka (ikhtiyaari - otomaatig ayay u dhacdaa):

bilaab_nasiib();

docs.title: bilaab_nasiib()
docs.text:
Wac mar qura bilaab_nasiib() ka hor inta aanad isticmaalin hawlaha kale si loo bilaabo.

bilaab_nasiib();

Soo-celinta: waxbo

docs.title: nasiib_tiro(ugu_yaraan, ugu_badnaan)
docs.text:
Soo saar integer(tiro) nasiib ah oo u dhexeeya ugu yaraan iyo ugu badnaan (oo ay ku jiraan).

keyd:tiro num = nasiib_tiro(1, 100);
qor("Nasiib: ");
qor(num);  // 1-100

Halbeegyada: - ugu_yaraan (tiro) - Qiimaha ugu yar - ugu_badnaan (tiro) - Qiimaha ugu weyn

Soo-celinta: tiro - Integer nasiib ah

docs.title: nasiib_jajab(ugu_yaraan, ugu_badnaan)
docs.text:
Soo saar float nasiib ah oo u dhexeeya ugu yaraan iyo ugu badnaan.

keyd:jajab num = nasiib_jajab(0.0, 1.0);
qor("Jajab nasiib ah: ");
qor(num);  // tusaale, 0.456789

Halbeegyada: - ugu_yaraan (jajab) - Qiimaha ugu yar - ugu_badnaan (jajab) - Qiimaha ugu weyn

Soo-celinta: jajab - Float nasiib ah

docs.title: Tusaale
docs.text:
keen "nasiib";

bilaab_nasiib();

// Integer nasiib ah 1-10
keyd:tiro num1 = nasiib_tiro(1, 10);
qor("Lulidda laadhka: ");
qor(num1);

// Jajab nasiib ah 0-1
keyd:jajab num2 = nasiib_jajab(0.0, 1.0);
qor("Jajab nasiib ah: ");
qor(num2);

docs.title: Module-ka OS
docs.text: Module-ka OS wuxuu bixiyaa nidaamka faylka iyo hawlgallada nidaamka.

docs.title: Keenista (Import)
docs.text: keen "os";

docs.title: halkee()
docs.text:
Hel directory-ga shaqada ee hadda (current working directory).

keyd:eray cwd = os.halkee();
qor(cwd);

Soo-celinta: eray - Wadada directory-ga hadda

docs.title: u_guur(folder)
docs.text:
Beddel directory-ga.

os.u_guur("/path/to/folder");

Halbeegyada: - folder (eray) - Wadada loo guurayo

docs.title: itus(wadada)
docs.text:
Liis gareey waxyaabaha ku jira directory-ga.

keyd:tix:eray files = os.itus("/path/to/folder");
soco item kasta laga helo files {
    qor(item);
}

Halbeegyada: - wadada (eray) - Wadada directory-ga

Soo-celinta: tix:eray - Tix ka kooban magacyada faylka/folder-ka

docs.title: abuur_folder(wadada)
docs.text:
Abuur directory cusub.

os.abuur_folder("myfolder");

Halbeegyada: - wadada (eray) - Wadada la abuurayo

docs.title: tirtir_folder(wadada)
docs.text:
Ka saar (tirtir) directory.

os.tirtir_folder("myfolder");

Halbeegyada: - wadada (eray) - Wadada la tirtirayo

docs.title: tirtir_fayl(wadada)
docs.text:
Tirtir fayl.

os.tirtir_fayl("file.txt");

Halbeegyada: - wadada (eray) - Wadada faylka la tirtirayo

docs.title: majiraa(wadada)
docs.text:
Hubi haddii wadadu jirto.

keyd:miyaa exists = os.majiraa("file.txt");
haddii (exists) {
    qor("Faylku waa jiraa!");
}

Halbeegyada: - wadada (eray) - Wadada la hubinayo

Soo-celinta: miyaa - haa haddii uu jiro, maya haddii kale

docs.title: fayl_miyaa(wadada)
docs.text:
Hubi haddii uu yahay fayl jira.

keyd:miyaa isFile = os.fayl_miyaa("file.txt");

Halbeegyada: - wadada (eray) - Wadada la hubinayo

Soo-celinta: miyaa - haa haddii uu yahay fayl, maya haddii kale

docs.title: folder_miyaa(wadada)
docs.text:
Hubi haddii uu yahay directory (folder) jira.

keyd:miyaa isDir = os.folder_miyaa("folder");

Halbeegyada: - wadada (eray) - Wadada la hubinayo

Soo-celinta: miyaa - haa haddii uu yahay folder, maya haddii kale

docs.title: hel_deegaan(magac)
docs.text:
Hel doorsoomaha deegaanka (environment variable).

keyd:eray path = os.hel_deegaan("PATH");
qor(path);

Halbeegyada: - magac (eray) - Magaca doorsoomaha

Soo-celinta: eray - Qiimaha doorsoomaha

docs.title: deji_deegaan(magac, qiimo)
docs.text:
Deji doorsoomaha deegaanka.

os.deji_deegaan("MY_VAR", "hello");

Halbeegyada: - magac (eray) - Magaca doorsoomaha - qiimo (eray) - Qiimaha doorsoomaha

docs.title: fuli(amar)
docs.text:
Fuli amarka shell-ka.

keyd:tiro natiijo = os.fuli("ls -la");

Halbeegyada: - amar (eray) - Amarka shell-ka

Soo-celinta: tiro - Exit code

docs.title: koobi(il, meel)
docs.text:
Koobiyeey fayl.

os.koobi("source.txt", "dest.txt");

Halbeegyada: - il (eray) - Wadada faylka asalka ah - meel (eray) - Wadada meesha loo koobiyeynayo

docs.title: nuqul(il, meel)
docs.text:
Waa la mid koobi - koobiyeey fayl.

os.nuqul("source.txt", "dest.txt");

docs.title: u_dhaqaaji(wadadii_hore, wadada_cusub)
docs.text:
Dhaqaaji ama dib u magacow faylka/folder-ka.

os.u_dhaqaaji("old.txt", "new.txt");

Halbeegyada: - wadadii_hore (eray) - Wadada hadda - wadada_cusub (eray) - Wadada cusub

docs.title: aqri_fayl(wadada)
docs.text:
Akhri nuxurka faylka.

keyd:eray content = os.aqri_fayl("file.txt");
qor(content);

Halbeegyada: - wadada (eray) - Wadada faylka

Soo-celinta: eray - Nuxurka faylka

docs.title: qor_fayl(wadada, nuxur, ku_dar)
docs.text:
Wax ku qor faylka.

// Qor (dib u qor)
os.qor_fayl("file.txt", "Hello", maya);

// Ku dar (append)
os.qor_fayl("file.txt", " World", haa);

Halbeegyada: - wadada (eray) - Wadada faylka - nuxur (eray) - Waxa la qorayo - ku_dar (miyaa) - haa haddii aad ku darayso, maya haddii aad dib u qorayso

docs.title: isku_dar_waddo(qayb1, qayb2)
docs.text:
Isku dar qaybaha wadada.

keyd:eray full = os.isku_dar_waddo("folder", "file.txt");
qor(full);  // "folder/file.txt"

Halbeegyada: - qayb1 (eray) - Qaybta koowaad ee wadada - qayb2 (eray) - Qaybta labaad ee wadada

Soo-celinta: eray - Wadada isku dhafan

docs.title: cabbir_fayl(wadada)
docs.text:
Hel baaxadda faylka oo byte ah.

keyd:tiro size = os.cabbir_fayl("file.txt");
qor("Baaxadda faylka: " + nooc(size));

Halbeegyada: - wadada (eray) - Wadada faylka

Soo-celinta: tiro - Baaxadda faylka oo byte ah

docs.title: Module-ka Wakhti
docs.text: Module-ka Wakhti wuxuu bixiyaa hawlaha wakhtiga iyo taariikhda.

docs.title: keenista (Import)
docs.text: keen "wakhti";

docs.title: hadda()
docs.text:
Hel timestamp-ka hadda jooga.

keyd:jajab hadda = wakhti.hadda();
qor("Timestamp: ");
qor(hadda);

Soo-celinta: jajab - Unix timestamp (ilbiriqsiyo tan iyo epoch)

docs.title: qaab(format)
docs.text:
Qaabee wakhtiga hadda jooga.

keyd:eray qaabaysan = wakhti.qaab("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S");
qor(qaabaysan);  // tusaale, "2024-01-15 10:30:45"

Halbeegyada: - format (eray) - Erayga qaabaynta

Xarfaha qaabaynta (Format specifiers): | Code | Sharaxaad | |------|-------------| | %Y | Sanadka (4 god) | | %m | Bisha (01-12) | | %d | Maalinta (01-31) | | %H | Saacadda (00-23) | | %M | Daqiiqadda (00-59) | | %S | Ilbiriqsiga (00-59) |

Soo-celinta: eray - Erayga wakhtiga oo qaabaysan

docs.title: sekeno()
docs.text:
Hel ilbiriqsiyada hadda (0-59).

keyd:tiro sec = wakhti.sekeno();
qor("Ilbiriqsiyo: ");
qor(sec);

Soo-celinta: tiro - Ilbiriqsiyo (0-59)

docs.title: daqiiqado()
docs.text:
Hel daqiiqadaha hadda (0-59).

keyd:tiro min = wakhti.daqiiqado();
qor("Daqiiqado: ");
qor(min);

Soo-celinta: tiro - Daqiiqado (0-59)

docs.title: saacado()
docs.text:
Hel saacadaha hadda (0-23).

keyd:tiro hr = wakhti.saacado();
qor("Saacad: ");
qor(hr);

Soo-celinta: tiro - Saacadood (0-23)

docs.title: maalin()
docs.text:
Hel maalinta bisha ee hadda (1-31).

keyd:tiro day = wakhti.maalin();
qor("Maalin: ");
qor(day);

Soo-celinta: tiro - Maalin (1-31)

docs.title: bil()
docs.text:
Hel bisha hadda (1-12).

keyd:tiro month = wakhti.bil();
qor("Bil: ");
qor(month);

Soo-celinta: tiro - Bil (1-12)

docs.title: sanad()
docs.text:
Hel sanadka hadda.

keyd:tiro year = wakhti.sanad();
qor("Sanad: ");
qor(year);

Soo-celinta: tiro - Sanadka oo buuxa

docs.title: Tusaale
docs.text:
keen "wakhti";

qor("Wakhtiga hadda:");
qor("Saacad: " + nooc(wakhti.saacado()));
qor("Daqiiqad: " + nooc(wakhti.daqiiqado()));
qor("Ilbiriqsi: " + nooc(wakhti.sekeno()));

qor("Taariikhda:");
qor("Maalin: " + nooc(wakhti.maalin()));
qor("Bil: " + nooc(wakhti.bil()));
qor("Sanad: " + nooc(wakhti.sanad()));

docs.title: Module-ka WebXiriiriye
docs.text: Module-ka WebXiriiriye wuxuu bixiyaa taageerada WebSocket ee xiriirka labada dhinac ee wakhtiga dhabta ah.

docs.title: Keenista (Import)
docs.text: keen "webxiriiriye";

docs.title: Samee WebSocket
docs.text: keyd:WebXiriiriye ws = WebXiriiriye() cusub;

docs.title: kor_u_qaad(socket_handle, ws_key)
docs.text:
U dallacsii xiriirka HTTP una beddel WebSocket.

keyd:eray ws_key = "dGhlIHNhbXBsZSBncmF2aXR5";  // Ka yimid HTTP request header
ws.kor_u_qaad(client_socket_handle, ws_key);

Halbeegyada: - client_socket_handle (eray) - Macmiilka socket handle-kiisa oo ka yimid server-ka HTTP - ws_key (eray) - Sec-WebSocket-Key oo ka yimid HTTP request header

docs.title: dir_qoraal(fariin)
docs.text:
Dir fariin qoraal ah.

keyd:tiro sent = ws.dir_qoraal("Hello!");
qor("Bytes la diray: ");
qor(sent);

Halbeegyada: - fariin (eray) - Qoraalka fariinta

Soo-celinta: tiro - Bytes-ka la diray, ama -1 haddii uu qalad dhaco

docs.title: dir_binary(xog)
docs.text:
Dir xog binary ah.

keyd:tiro sent = ws.dir_binary("\x00\x01\x02");

Halbeegyada: - xog (eray) - Xogta binary-ga ah

Soo-celinta: tiro - Bytes-ka la diray, ama -1 haddii uu qalad dhaco

docs.title: soo_hel_fariin()
docs.text:
Hel fariinta WebSocket.

keyd:qaamuus msg = ws.soo_hel_fariin();
haddii (msg["xaalad"] == "guul") {
    haddii (msg["nooc"] == "qoraal") {
        qor("Qoraal: ");
        qor(msg["xog"]);
    } ama_haddii (msg["nooc"] == "binary") {
        qor("Binary la helay");
    } ama_haddii (msg["nooc"] == "xir") {
        qor("Xiriirka waa la xiray");
    }
}

Soo-celinta: qaamuus - Shayga fariinta oo leh: - xaalad: "guul" ama "qalad" - nooc: "qoraal", "binary", "ping", "pong", ama "xir" - xog: Nuxurka fariinta

docs.title: dir_ping()
docs.text:
Dir frame-ka ping.

keyd:tiro natiijo = ws.dir_ping();

Soo-celinta: tiro - 0 haddii lagu guuleysto, -1 haddii kale

docs.title: dir_pong()
docs.text:
Dir frame-ka pong.

keyd:tiro natiijo = ws.dir_pong();

Soo-celinta: tiro - 0 haddii lagu guuleysto, -1 haddii kale

docs.title: xir(cod, sabab)
docs.text:
Xir xiriirka WebSocket.

ws.xir(1000, "Xiritaan caadi ah");

Halbeegyada: - cod (tiro) - Code-ka xiritaanka (1000 = xiritaan caadi ah) - sabab (eray) - Sababta xiritaanka

docs.title: ma_xiran()
docs.text:
Hubi haddii WebSocket uu xiriirsan yahay.

haddii (ws.ma_xiran()) {
    qor("Waa xiriirsan yahay!");
}

Soo-celinta: miyaa - haa haddii uu xiriirsan yahay, maya haddii kale

docs.title: Tusaale: Server WebSocket
docs.text:
keen "xiriiriye";
keen "webxiriiriye";
keen "http";

keyd:Xiriiriye server = Xiriiriye() cusub;
keyd:eray handle = server.samee_server("8080");

haddii (handle == "") {
    qor("Server-ku waa fashilmay!");
    server.xir();
}

server.dhageyso(5);
qor("WebSocket server-ku wuxuu ku jiraa port 8080");

keyd:eray client = server.aqbal();
haddii (client == "") {
    qor("Macmiil ma jiro");
} haddii_kale {
    // Hel WebSocket key ka yimid codsiga HTTP
    keyd:eray ws_key = http.fariin_weyn(client, "Sec-WebSocket-Key");

    keyd:WebXiriiriye ws = WebXiriiriye() cusub;
    ws.kor_u_qaad(client, ws_key);

    qor("WebSocket waa xiriiray!");

    // Echo fariimaha
    keyd:qaamuus msg = ws.soo_hel_fariin();
    haddii (msg["xaalad"] == "guul" iyo msg["nooc"] == "qoraal") {
        ws.dir_qoraal(msg["xog"]);  // Dib u soo celi
    }

    ws.xir(1000, "Waa dhammaaday");
}

server.xir();

docs.title: Module-ka Xiriiriye
docs.text: Module-ka Xiriiriye wuxuu bixiyaa barnaamijka socket-ka ee heerka hoose ee xiriirka TCP.

docs.title: Soo-dejinta (Import)
docs.text: keen "xiriiriye";

docs.title: Samee Socket
docs.text: keyd:Xiriiriye socket = Xiriiriye() cusub;

docs.title: samee_server(port)
docs.text:
Abuur socket server oo ka dhageysanaya port cayiman.

keyd:eray handle = socket.samee_server("8080");
haddii (handle == "") {
    qor("Fashil ku yimid abuurista server-ka!");
} haddii_kale {
    qor("Server-ka waa la abuuray!");
}

Halbeegyada: - port (eray) - Lambarka port-ka oo eray ah (tusaale, "8080")

Soo-celinta: eray - Socket handle (eray madhan haddii uu fashilmo)

docs.title: dhageyso(ugu_badan_macmiil)
docs.text:
Billow dhageysiga xiriirada.

keyd:tiro natiijo = socket.dhageyso(5);
haddii (natiijo == 0) {
    qor("Dhageysanaya...");
}

Halbeegyada: - ugu_badan_macmiil (tiro) - Dhererka ugu badan ee safka sugitaanka (badanaa 5-10)

Soo-celinta: tiro - 0 haddii lagu guuleysto, -1 haddii kale

docs.title: aqbal()
docs.text:
Aqbal xiriirka macmiilka ee soo socda.

keyd:eray client_handle = socket.aqbal();
haddii (client_handle == "") {
    qor("Macmiil ma xiriirsana");
} haddii_kale {
    qor("Macmiil waa soo xiriiray!");
}

Soo-celinta: eray - Macmiilka handle-kiisa (eray madhan haddii uusan jirin xiriir)

docs.title: kuxirmo(host, port)
docs.text:
Ku xirmo server fog sidii macmiil (client).

keyd:eray handle = socket.kuxirmo("example.com", "80");
haddii (handle == "") {
    qor("Xiriirku waa fashilmay!");
}

Halbeegyada: - host (eray) - Magaca host-ka ama IP (tusaale, "example.com", "127.0.0.1") - port (eray) - Port-ka oo eray ah (tusaale, "80")

Soo-celinta: eray - Socket handle (eray madhan haddii uu fashilmo)

docs.title: dir(xogta)
docs.text:
Xog ku dir socket-ka.

keyd:tiro bytes_sent = socket.dir("Hello Server!");
qor("Bytes la diray: ");
qor(bytes_sent);

Halbeegyada: - xogta (eray) - Xogta la dirayo

Soo-celinta: tiro - Bytes-ka la diray, ama -1 haddii uu qalad dhaco

docs.title: soo_hel(size)
docs.text:
Ka hel xog socket-ka.

keyd:eray data = socket.soo_hel(1024);
qor("La helay: ");
qor(data);

Halbeegyada: - size (tiro) - Bytes-ka ugu badan ee la helayo

Soo-celinta: eray - Xogta la helay

docs.title: xir()
docs.text:
Xir socket-ka.

socket.xir();

docs.title: waa_ansax()
docs.text:
Hubi haddii socket-ku yahay mid ansax ah.

haddii (socket.waa_ansax()) {
    qor("Socket-ku waa furan yahay");
}

Soo-celinta: miyaa - haa haddii uu ansax yahay, maya haddii kale

docs.title: Tusaale Server
docs.text:
keen "xiriiriye";

keyd:Xiriiriye server = Xiriiriye() cusub;
keyd:eray handle = server.samee_server("9999");

haddii (handle == "") {
    qor("Abuurista server-ka waa fashilantay!");
    server.xir();
}

server.dhageyso(5);
qor("Sugaya macmiil...");

keyd:eray client = server.aqbal();
haddii (client == "") {
    qor("Macmiil ma xiriirsana");
} haddii_kale {
    qor("Macmiil waa soo xiriiray!");
    server.dir("Ku soo dhowow server-ka!");
}

server.xir();

docs.title: Tusaale Macmiil (Client)
docs.text:
keen "xiriiriye";

keyd:Xiriiriye client = Xiriiriye() cusub;
keyd:eray handle = client.kuxirmo("example.com", "80");

haddii (handle == "") {
    qor("Xiriirku waa fashilmay!");
    client.xir();
}

// Dir codsi HTTP ah
client.dir("GET / HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: example.com\r\n\r\n");

// Hel jawaabta
keyd:eray response = client.soo_hel(4096);
qor(response);

client.xir();

docs.title: Maktabadda Caadiga ah (Standard Library)
docs.text: Tusmo waxay la timaadaa modules ku dhex dhisan oo ku jira folder-ka stdlib/. Kuwan waxaa lagu soo dejiyaa iyadoo la isticmaalayo keyword-ka keen.

docs.title: Hawlaha ku dhex dhisan (Built-in Functions)
docs.text: Hawlahani waxay diyaar yihiin iyadoon waxba la soo dejin:

docs.title: Soo-saarka (Output)
docs.text: qor("Hello!");      // Ku daabac console-ka

docs.title: Hawlaha Erayada (String Functions)
docs.text: Hawsha Sharaxaad Tusaale dherer(str) Hel dhererka erayga dherer("hello") → 5 nooc(value) Hel nooca xogta nooc(123) → "tiro" eray(value) U beddel eray eray(3.14) → "3.14" tiro(value) U beddel integer tiro("42") → 42 jajab(value) U beddel float jajab("3.14") → 3.14 miyaa(value) U beddel boolean miyaa("haa") → haa

docs.title: Hawlaha Tixda (Array Functions)
docs.text: Hawsha Sharaxaad Tusaale tix_cayiman(arr) Hel nooca tixda Waxay soo celisaa nooca xubinta

docs.title: Soo-dejinta Modules-ka (Importing Modules)
docs.text:
keen "os";
keen "wakhti";
keen "nasiib";
keen "xiriiriye";
keen "http";

docs.title: Qaybaha Maktabadda
docs.text:
• Module-ka OS - Nidaamka faylka iyo hawlgallada nidaamka
  • Module-ka Wakhti - Hawlaha wakhtiga iyo taariikhda
  • Module-ka Nasiib - Soo saarista lambarrada nasiibka ah (random)
  • Module-ka Xiriiriye - Barnaamijka TCP socket
  • Module-ka WebXiriiriye - Taageerada WebSocket
  • Module-ka HTTP - HTTP server iyo maareynta codsiyada

docs.title: Erayada (Strings)
docs.text: Erayada (Strings) gudaha Tusmo waxay isticmaalaan nooca eray.

docs.title: Sheegista
docs.text:
keyd:eray str1 = "Hello";
keyd:eray str2;
keyd:eray str3 = "";

docs.title: Isku-dhafka (Concatenation)
docs.text: keyd:eray str = "Hello" + " " + "World";

docs.title: Dhererka (Length)
docs.text: qor(dherer(str1));  // Hel dhererka erayga

docs.title: Tilmaamidda (Indexing)
docs.text:
qor(str1[0]);  // Xarafka koowaad
qor(str1[1]);  // Xarafka labaad

docs.title: F-Strings
docs.text:
U isticmaal $"{}" isku-dhafka:

keyd:eray midho = "Tufaax";
qor($"Waan jeclahay {midho}");
qor($"Xisaab: 5 * 3 = {5 * 3}");

Erayada safafka badan:

keyd:eray safar = $"Kani waa 
safar
badan";

docs.title: Isbarbardhigga (Comparison)
docs.text:
keyd:eray a = "abc";
keyd:eray b = "abc";
keyd:eray c = "def";

qor(a == b);  // haa
qor(a == c);  // maya

docs.title: Varaibles
docs.text: Tusmo waa luqad statically-typed ah oo leh noocyo si cad loo sheego.

docs.title: Syntax-ka Sheegista
docs.text:
keyd:<nooca> <magaca>;
keyd:<nooca> <magaca> = <qiimaha>;

docs.title: Noocyada Xogta
docs.text: Nooca Sharaxaad Tusaale tiro Integer 10, -5, 42 jajab Float 3.14, -2.5 eray String "Hello" xaraf Character 'A', 'B' miyaa Boolean haa (haa), maya (maya) tix:<nooca> Array [1, 2, 3] qaamuus Dictionary {"fure": "qiimo"} waxbo Void/null Qiimo ma leh

docs.title: Integer (tiro)
docs.text:
keyd:tiro a = 10;
keyd:tiro b;
keyd:tiro c = 5 + 3;

docs.title: Float (jajab)
docs.text:
keyd:jajab pi = 3.14;
keyd:jajab x = 2.5 * 4.2;

docs.title: String (eray)
docs.text:
keyd:eray magac = "Hello";
keyd:eray salaam = magac + " World";

docs.title: Character (xaraf)
docs.text:
keyd:xaraf ch = 'A';
keyd:xaraf ch2 = 'B';

docs.title: Boolean (miyaa)
docs.text:
keyd:miyaa flag1 = haa;
keyd:miyaa flag2 = maya;
keyd:miyaa flag3 = a > 5;

docs.title: Array (tix)
docs.text:
keyd:tix:tiro tirooyin = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5];
keyd:tix:eray erayo = ["aa", "bb", "cc"];
keyd:tix:tiro eber = [];

docs.title: Dictionary (qaamuus)
docs.text:
keyd:qaamuus qof = {"magac": "Ali", "da": 25};
keyd:qaamuus qaamuusEber;

docs.title: Void (waxbo)
docs.text: keyd:waxbo waxba;

docs.title: F-Strings
docs.text:
U isticmaal $"{}" isku-dhafka erayada:

keyd:eray magac = "Tusmo";
keyd:tiro da'da = 5;
qor($"Magacu waa {magac}, Da'du waa {da'da}");

docs.title: Ternary Operator
docs.text:
keyd:miyaa cond = a > 5;
keyd:eray natiijo = cond ? "weyn" : "yar";
